hero.title: AURA Luxe Clinic
hero.subtitle: Personalized care. Subtle results. Lasting confidence.

signature.label: SCIENCE-LED SKINCARE
signature.title: Signature AURA Care
signature.description: We combine clinical precision with an editorial eye—so every treatment looks like you, only elevated.

about.title: About AURA
about.description: We're a team of aesthetic doctors and certified therapists focused on preventive skin health. Our protocols are evidence-based, our environment is calm, and our results are designed to feel natural.

services.title: Our Services
services.description: From first-time facials to advanced aesthetic plans, we build treatments around your schedule, your sensitivity, and your goals.

treatments.title: Treatments
treatments.description: Every plan starts with a skin assessment. We prioritize safety, minimal downtime, and results that improve over time—not overnight exaggeration.

results.title: Results
results.description: Improvements appear gradually—better texture, calmer redness, brighter tone. We photograph progress and adjust protocols as your skin evolves.

team.title: Team
team.description: Our practitioners train continuously—new techniques, safer protocols, and a refined sense of balance. We listen first, then treat.

booking.title: Booking
booking.description: Choose a service, pick a time, and arrive 10 minutes early. We'll confirm via SMS and send prep instructions.

gift.title: Gift Card
gift.description: Give the experience of great skin. Choose an amount, add a note, and we'll handle the rest—beautiful packaging included.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: We ask for feedback after every cycle of treatments. Here's what our clients say about the experience—and the results.
reviews.quote: My skin has never felt this calm and clear.
reviews.author: — Daria T.

footer.copyright: © AURA Luxe Clinic. All rights reserved.
